title: stipa elatior
intro: Stipa elatior, also known as feather grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe, Asia, and parts of North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Stipa elatior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support digestive health and alleviate various gastrointestinal issues.
